title: Laravel Framework Segment 04
summary: A large Laravel framework development segment covering 391 PRs across 22 dependency layers. This segment touches nearly every Illuminate component: Database (query builder, Eloquent attributes/relations), HTTP client, routing (resource registrar, middleware), support utilities (Str, Sleep, collections), queue (unique jobs, batch), cache (flexible store management), validation, mail, console (Artisan kernel, scheduling), testing helpers, and foundational services. Tests accompany most changes with 141 PRs including test modifications.
instructionPreview: `/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.
instruction:
You are an autonomous engineer. The repository at /workspace is at an earlier state of a real-world project.

`/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.

moduleDag.description: A large Laravel framework development segment covering 391 PRs across 22 dependency layers. This segment touches nearly every Illuminate component: Database (query builder, Eloquent attributes/relations), HTTP client, routing (resource registrar, middleware), support utilities (Str, Sleep, collections), queue (unique jobs, batch), cache (flexible store management), validation, mail, console (Artisan kernel, scheduling), testing helpers, and foundational services. Tests accompany most changes with 141 PRs including test modifications.

nodes.label: Database (Eloquent & Query Builder)
nodes.description: Query Builder (15 edge references, most connected file), Eloquent Builder, HasAttributes concern (13 edge references), Query Grammars, migrations (Migrator), schema building, and database connections. The most heavily modified source component with 83 PRs adding query methods, fixing attribute casting, and improving grammar generation.

nodes.label: Support Utilities
nodes.description: Str (7 edge references), Stringable, Sleep (5 PRs), Facades (Process, etc.), helpers, Carbon integration, and Lottery. Provides the utility foundation that other components build upon, with 41 PRs for new methods, fluent improvements, and testing utilities.

nodes.label: Routing
nodes.description: ResourceRegistrar (4 PRs), Router, middleware handling, route model binding, URL generation, and controller dispatch. 23 PRs covering resource route customization, middleware ordering, and route resolution improvements.

nodes.label: Foundation & Application
nodes.description: Application container (6 PRs), helpers.php (5 PRs), Console Kernel (4 PRs), exception handling, service providers, and environment detection. 42 PRs touching the application bootstrap, Artisan integration, and core services.

nodes.label: Collections
nodes.description: Collection (6 PRs), LazyCollection (5 PRs), and Enumerable interface (5 PRs). 15 PRs adding new collection methods (dot, undot, sliding), fixing lazy evaluation, and maintaining interface parity.

nodes.label: HTTP Client
nodes.description: PendingRequest (10 edge references), Request, Response, middleware, file uploads, and client pool. 21 PRs for retry logic, request options, connection handling, and response assertion improvements.

nodes.label: Console (Artisan)
nodes.description: Artisan command infrastructure, scheduling, command events, and output formatting. 19 PRs for scheduling improvements, command isolation, and event dispatching during console operations.

nodes.label: Queue
nodes.description: Job dispatching, ShouldBeUnique handling, batch processing, failed job management, and queue workers. 18 PRs fixing unique lock release, batch callbacks, and afterResponse dispatch flow.

nodes.label: Cache
nodes.description: CacheManager (5 PRs), store implementations (Redis, file, database, array), rate limiting, and cache tags. 21 PRs for store configuration, TTL handling, and flexible cache driver management.

nodes.label: Validation
nodes.description: ValidatesAttributes concern (6 PRs), validation rules, form requests, and error message formatting. 18 PRs for new validation rules, conditional validation, and improved error messaging.

nodes.label: Mail
nodes.description: Mailable, mailer, transport configuration, and markdown mail rendering. 10 PRs for mail assertions, transport options, and content generation.

nodes.label: Testing Helpers
nodes.description: HTTP test assertions (AssertsStatusCodes, 4 PRs), test response, test view, and fake implementations. 10 PRs adding assertion methods, improving test output, and simplifying test setup.

nodes.label: Translation
nodes.description: Language files (en/validation.php, 4 PRs), translator, message selectors, and pluralization. 7 PRs updating validation messages and translation loading.

nodes.label: View & Blade
nodes.description: Blade compiler, view factory, view components, and template rendering. 8 PRs for Blade directives, component attributes, and view composition.

nodes.label: Authentication
nodes.description: Guard implementations, authentication manager, password broker, and session-based auth. 8 PRs for login throttling, remember tokens, and guard configuration.

nodes.label: Contracts (Interfaces)
nodes.description: Interface definitions that decouple components: Queue, Cache, Mail, Database, Foundation contracts. 10 PRs adding interface methods to maintain component boundaries as features evolve.

nodes.label: Test Suite
nodes.description: Comprehensive test coverage: DatabaseQueryBuilderTest (13 edge references), HttpClientTest (9 PRs), SupportStrTest, SleepTest, DatabaseEloquentModelTest, RoutingRouteTest, ProcessTest, and integration tests. 149 test files modified across 141 PRs ensuring regression coverage.

nodes.label: Build Configuration
nodes.description: Composer dependency management and autoloading configuration. 11 PRs updating package requirements, dev dependencies, and component metadata.

edges.label: Database implements queue/cache contracts for database drivers
Query Builder and Eloquent use Str, helpers, and collections
Support utilities provide collection macro and helper foundations
Console Kernel bootstraps through Foundation Application
unique job locks use cache store for distributed locking
Queue implements ShouldBeUnique and dispatch contracts
Foundation registers route service provider and middleware
validation error messages use translation system
routing dispatches HTTP requests to controllers
auth guards register through Foundation service providers
mail rendering uses Blade/view for markdown templates
testing assertions wrap HTTP response objects
